title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・オブテイン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide loses the autumn Tenno Sho. Even
so, she feels proud of her performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tears well up in Biwa Hayahide's eyes as she
realizes how much she's grown. She's no longer
that girl who once lost to her sister and injured
herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've perfected a winning equation to
beat her younger sister, Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only two months remain until we unveil it at the
Arima Kinen.
